fileBaselines.content:
# Kitty Terminal Configuration
# Basic config for Hyprland, Starship, and Zsh

# Font settings
font_family JetBrains Mono
font_size 12
# Use modify_font instead of deprecated adjust_line_height
modify_font cell_height 120%

# Shell
shell zsh

# Transparency for Hyprland
background_opacity 0.9

# Disable audio bell
enable_audio_bell no

# Wayland support - force Wayland for Hyprland
linux_display_server wayland

# Cursor settings
cursor_shape beam

# Shell integration (works with Zsh and Starship)
shell_integration enabled

# Scrollback
scrollback_lines 10000

# Tab settings
tab_bar_style powerline
tab_powerline_style slanted

# TERM variable - keep as default for compatibility
# Don't change this unless you have issues
term xterm-kitty

# Ensure proper color support
# This is important for tmux and terminal applications
env COLORTERM=truecolor

# Keybindings (basic)
map ctrl+shift+c copy_to_clipboard
map ctrl+shift+v paste_from_clipboard
map ctrl+shift+t new_tab
map ctrl+shift+w close_tab

# Reload config easily
map ctrl+shift+f5 load_config_file
